mapper.select: SELECT u.account_sn AS account_sn, u.login_id AS login_id, u.display_name AS display_name, a.agent_id AS me_agent_id, a.agent_name AS me_agent_name, a.status AS me_status, a.context_pct AS me_context_pct, a.workspace_dir AS me_workspace_dir, a.updated_at AS me_updated_at FROM t_user u LEFT JOIN t_ai_agent a ON a.owner_account_sn = u.account_sn AND a.tmux_session LIKE 'aidesk-self-%' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE u.account_sn <> #{excludeAccountSn} ORDER BY u.account_sn ASC

SELECT u.account_sn AS account_sn, u.login_id AS login_id, u.display_name AS display_name, a.agent_id AS me_agent_id, a.agent_name AS me_agent_name, a.status AS me_status, a.context_pct AS me_context_pct, a.workspace_dir AS me_workspace_dir, a.updated_at AS me_updated_at FROM t_user u INNER JOIN t_ai_agent a ON a.owner_account_sn = u.account_sn AND a.agent_type = 'external' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE u.account_sn = #{ownerAccountSn} ORDER BY a.started_at ASC
